calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-08-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2013 Continued To Nov-27-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Judgment Against Deft Evelyn Doumba To Quiet Title
Off Calendar Oct-10-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Proceedings reported by: Laura Martinez, CSR#11332. Telephone #415 250 2926.

Ryan J. Patterson, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, MF FUND II LP, a California limited partnership.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) EVELYN DOUMBA, all persons known or unknown, and all personas who were not parties to the action and who have any claim to the property.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Witness: Keith Goodman sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

IT IS ORDERED, ADJUDGED AND DECREED that, pursuant to Civil Code of Procedure section 764.030, judgment is entered against defendant Evelyn Doumba, all persons known or unknown, and all persons who were not parties to the action and who have any claim to the property which was not of record at the time the lis pendens was filed, and in favor of plaintiff MF FUND II, LP to quiet title on the Property.

Judgment signed in open court.
